languages.original_text: "I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: "Мне не вполны ясны причины вашего смущения, сенешаль. Генеалогические истоки и склонности индивида не определяют его способность к установлению близких связей личного характера, и это неоспоримый факт".

"I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."
languages.original_text: "Мне не вполны ясны причины вашего смущения, сенешаль. Генеалогические истоки и склонности индивида не определяют его способность к установлению близких связей личного характера, и это неоспоримый факт".

traits.locale_text: "I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

"I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

"I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: «No comprendo del todo los motivos tras su confusión, Senescal. El origen genealógico de un individuo y sus tendencias no determinan sus capacidades de formar vínculos personales cercanos. Esto es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: "I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: «No comprendo del todo los motivos tras su confusión, Senescal. El origen genealógico de un individuo y sus tendencias no determinan sus capacidades de formar vínculos personales cercanos. Esto es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: 「あなたが当惑されている理由が、私にはいまひとつ分かりかねます、家令殿。個人の血統的出自や性向が、親密な個人的絆を結ぶ能力を決定づけるわけではありません。これは議論の余地のない事実です」
languages.original_text: "I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが当惑されている理由が、私にはいまひとつ分かりかねます、家令殿。個人の血統的出自や性向が、親密な個人的絆を結ぶ能力を決定づけるわけではありません。これは議論の余地のない事実です」

languages.text: “我不太明白你困惑的原因，总领。一个人的出身与天性，并不能决定他建立亲密关系的能力。这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “我不太明白你困惑的原因，总领。一个人的出身与天性，并不能决定他建立亲密关系的能力。这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: "Mir sind die Gründe Eurer Verwirrung nicht ganz klar, Truchsess. Die genealogischen Ursprünge eines Individuums bestimmen nicht seine Fähigkeit, persönliche Bindungen einzugehen. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Mir sind die Gründe Eurer Verwirrung nicht ganz klar, Truchsess. Die genealogischen Ursprünge eines Individuums bestimmen nicht seine Fähigkeit, persönliche Bindungen einzugehen. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: « Je ne saisis pas bien les raisons de votre confusion, sénéchal. Les origines généalogiques et les tendances d'un individu ne sont pas déterminées par sa capacité à former des liens intimes. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: "I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne saisis pas bien les raisons de votre confusion, sénéchal. Les origines généalogiques et les tendances d'un individu ne sont pas déterminées par sa capacité à former des liens intimes. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: "Kafa karışıklığınızın nedenlerini tam olarak anlayamadım Seneşal. Bir bireyin şecere kökenleri ve eğilimleri, onun yakın kişisel bağlar kurma yeteneğini belirlemez. Bu inkâr edilemez bir gerçektir."
languages.original_text: "I am not entirely clear on the reasons for your confusion, Seneschal. An individual's genealogical origins and proclivities do not determine their ability to form close personal bonds. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Kafa karışıklığınızın nedenlerini tam olarak anlayamadım Seneşal. Bir bireyin şecere kökenleri ve eğilimleri, onun yakın kişisel bağlar kurma yeteneğini belirlemez. Bu inkâr edilemez bir gerçektir."
